title: S6. AHC037 / Soda
label: mx1_transmute_01
task_text:
Solve this Super-Eywa grading-bank question.
Question ID: coding-S6-ahc037-soda
Title: S6. AHC037 / Soda

Problem:
Starting from beverage (0, 0), build a target set of 1000 beverages with desired sweetness and carbonation pairs using a sequence of monotone derivation operations with minimum total cost.

Grading target:
round(10^6 * NL / (1 + C)), where C is total cost and L is the max coordinate scale.
Higher is better.

Return format:
FINAL_ANSWER: <your answer>
JUSTIFICATION: <brief justification>
root_result_excerpt:
The user wants to simplify a complex optimization problem into its core components for a downstream agent.
node_root_helper_01 (transmuted_child): Goal: Minimize the total cost of constructing a target set of 1000 (sweetness, carbonation) coordinate pairs starting from (0, 0). Constraints: Use only monotone derivation operations. Objective Function: Maximize round(10^6 * L / (1 + C)), where C is t
final_result_excerpt: Invalid node-authored response: live provider request failed: OpenRouter request failed: The read operation timed out. Raw response excerpt:
